profile.tagline: Full-stack dev passionate about AI, automation, and aerial drone footage.

hero.stack: Vue · React · Kotlin · C# · Drone · Video

about.title: About me
about.bio1: Software developer with an ITS diploma in Front-End Development and three years of experience across a full-stack range — frontend with Vue, React and Angular, backend with C# and Kotlin, mobile with React Native. I've worked in Agile teams for enterprise clients at NTT Data, built wellness platform backends at AlphaWaves, and completed formative internships at MSC Technology Italy and in the e-commerce sector.
about.bio2: Outside of code: video editing, color grading and aerial drone footage. Vice President and UAV operator at the Civil Protection of Saluggia. Curious by nature — from Raspberry Pi to LLMs, if it can be taken apart and put back together better, I'll try it.
